# neon_organization_api_key (Resource)

Manages an organization-scoped Neon API key. Import is not supported because the API key secret is only available at creation time.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "neon_organization_api_key" "example" {
  org_id = "org-my-organization-id"
  name   = "my-org-api-key"
}

# Optionally scope the key to a specific project
resource "neon_organization_api_key" "project_scoped" {
  org_id     = "org-my-organization-id"
  name       = "my-project-scoped-key"
  project_id = "my-project-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) A user-specified API key name.
- `org_id` (String) The Neon organization ID.

### Optional

- `project_id` (String) If set, the API key can access only this project.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) A timestamp indicating when the API key was created.
- `id` (Number) The API key ID.
- `key` (String, Sensitive) The generated API key. Only available after creation.
